build.buildCommand: echo "========================================================================" && echo "              O M O S T A T I O N  全 面 审 计" && echo "========================================================================" && echo "" && echo "=== 1. 项目结构 ===" && echo "--- 顶层项目 ---" && ls -d /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/projects/*/ 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/projects/||; s|/||' && echo "" && echo "--- kairon包数 ---" && ls -d /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/projects/kairon/packages/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "" && echo "=== 2. 编译状态 ===" && echo "--- Hermes Console ---" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c "error" && echo "errors" && npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -E "Tests|Files" && echo "" && echo "=== 3. 债务状态 ===" && for f in /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/.omo/debt/items/*.yaml; do name=$(basename "$f" .yaml); state=$(grep "lifecycle_state:" "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); weight=$(grep "weight:" "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); echo "  $name: $state (weight $weight)"; done && echo "" && echo "=== 4. OMO状态 ===" && cat /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/.omo/state/system.yaml | grep -E "health_score|current_phase|completed_tasks|total_tasks|phase.*status"
build.testCommand: echo "========================================================================" && echo "              O M O S T A T I O N  全 面 审 计" && echo "========================================================================" && echo "" && echo "=== 1. 项目结构 ===" && echo "--- 顶层项目 ---" && ls -d /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/projects/*/ 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/projects/||; s|/||' && echo "" && echo "--- kairon包数 ---" && ls -d /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/projects/kairon/packages/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "" && echo "=== 2. 编译状态 ===" && echo "--- Hermes Console ---" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c "error" && echo "errors" && npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -E "Tests|Files" && echo "" && echo "=== 3. 债务状态 ===" && for f in /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/.omo/debt/items/*.yaml; do name=$(basename "$f" .yaml); state=$(grep "lifecycle_state:" "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); weight=$(grep "weight:" "$f" | awk '{print $2}'); echo "  $name: $state (weight $weight)"; done && echo "" && echo "=== 4. OMO状态 ===" && cat /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/.omo/state/system.yaml | grep -E "health_score|current_phase|completed_tasks|total_tasks|phase.*status"
